memory.what_this_project_is: A planning and dependency-management system organising all areas of life and work toward the larger goal of volunteering in the Amazon. An interactive Gantt chart exists and is actively used.
purpose: Track all current goals and tasks
Prepare the flat so returning home is easier
Prevent loss of focus and forgotten tasks
Translate vague thoughts into charted next steps
system_requirements: Input thoughts, unfinished tasks, and changes
Auto-processing into: Tasks, Dependencies, Completed steps, New next actions
Expandable view of all project areas
Links to weekly review and daily dashboard
memory.why_needed: Unmanaged dependencies, focus lapses, memory gaps, and time-blindness can derail progress. System should reduce cognitive load by making the next step obvious.
memory.next_action: Connect Gantt outputs to tasks → weekly review → project dashboards
